## Epic 1 — Core Mechanics (#16)

**Dependency:** #11
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Write chapter 03 — Attributes as a polished AsciiDoc chapter.

### Chapter Structure
1. **Attribute Overview** — The six attributes and what they represent
2. **Brawn (BR)** — Physical strength, melee combat, carrying capacity
3. **Fortitude (FO)** — Endurance, health, poison/disease resistance
4. **Agility (AG)** — Speed, reflexes, ranged combat, stealth
5. **Guile (GU)** — Cunning, social manipulation, deception
6. **Knowledge (KN)** — Education, lore, investigation, crafting
7. **Reason (RE)** — Logic, problem-solving, magical aptitude
8. **Starting Attributes** — How to determine your scores (point buy/array/roll)
9. **Derived Statistics** — HP, initiative, movement, etc. (calculated from attributes)
10. **Attribute Checks** — When to roll raw attribute vs. skill

### Success Criteria
- Each attribute has at least 2 narrative examples
- Clear mechanical separation between attributes (no overlap)
- Derived stats table with formulas
- Builds without AsciiDoc errors

### Tasks
- [ ] Draft chapter 03 content
- [ ] Create attribute score → modifier table
- [ ] Create derived stats formulas
- [ ] Write narrative examples for each attribute in play
- [ ] Build and fix errors
- [ ] Cross-reference to: core resolution (ch06), skills (ch07), combat (ch13)
